ideas: You're not a real man until you've been rejected by a girl you've never talked to.
The only thing more painful than a failed goal is the regret that comes with never trying.
Being strong isn't about not showing emotions, it's about knowing when to face them.
The greatest weakness of a man is his inability to make decisions without overthinking.
Your self-worth shouldn't be tied to your bank account, but for many, it's the only reality.
The line between confidence and arrogance is blurred, but one thing's for sure, it's not confidence when you're always right.
The true test of a man isn't his strength, but his ability to admit when he's wrong.
You're not a loser for failing, but a winner for getting back up and trying again.
The world doesn't need more men who pretend to be something they're not, it needs men who are authentic in their failure.
The greatest strength of a man is his ability to accept his weaknesses and work on them.
